headline: Is Intuit Inc. (INTU) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is INTU a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Intuit Inc. on r/AIPortfolios by manojs. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on INTU. Intuit Inc.’s share was trading at $455.56 as of March 20th. INTU’s trailing and forward P/E were 29.64 and 19.76 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.
